label: Game condition
description: Defines a global map condition - heat wave, toxic fallout, eclipse, psychic drone - that persists for a duration and applies gameplay effects.

conditionClass.label: Condition class
conditionClass.description: C# GameCondition subclass that implements this condition's tick-by-tick effects.

exclusiveConditions.label: Exclusive conditions
exclusiveConditions.description: Other GameConditionDefs that cannot coexist with this one. If one is already active, this condition cannot start (private in source but consumed by CanCoexistWith).

startMessage.label: Start message
startMessage.description: Message shown to the player when this condition begins.

endMessage.label: End message
endMessage.description: Message shown to the player when this condition ends.

letterText.label: Letter text
letterText.description: Body text of the notification letter sent when this condition starts.

letterHyperlinks.label: Letter hyperlinks
letterHyperlinks.description: ThingDefs shown as clickable hyperlinks in the notification letter.

letterDef.label: Letter def
letterDef.description: LetterDef that controls the notification icon, sound, and urgency.

canBePermanent.label: Can be permanent
canBePermanent.description: If true, this condition can be set as permanent (no expiry) by a scenario part or incident.

showPermanentInTooltip.label: Show permanent in tooltip
showPermanentInTooltip.description: If true, the condition tooltip notes that the condition is permanent when no end date is set.

allowUnderground.label: Allow underground
allowUnderground.description: If true, this condition applies to underground maps as well as surface maps.

requireFish.label: Require fish
requireFish.description: If true, this condition is only eligible to start on maps that have fish population.

descriptionFuture.label: Description (future)
descriptionFuture.description: Description displayed in the condition tooltip when the condition has not yet begun.

jumpToSourceKey.label: Jump to source key
jumpToSourceKey.description: Translation key for the 'click to jump to source' tooltip action. Defaults to ClickToJumpToSource.

silencedByConditions.label: Silenced by conditions
silencedByConditions.description: GameConditionDefs whose presence suppresses this condition's letter and message output.

natural.label: Natural
natural.description: If true, this condition is treated as a natural weather event rather than a man-made or psychic effect.

preventNeutralVisitors.label: Prevent neutral visitors
preventNeutralVisitors.description: If true, neutral visitor caravans will not arrive while this condition is active.

preventShuttleLaunch.label: Prevent shuttle launch
preventShuttleLaunch.description: If true, shuttles cannot launch from the map while this condition is active.

causesTraderCaravanExit.label: Causes trader caravan exit
causesTraderCaravanExit.description: If true, any trader caravan on the map will attempt to leave while this condition is active.

preventIncidents.label: Prevent incidents
preventIncidents.description: If true, the storyteller will not fire new incidents while this condition is active.

displayOnUI.label: Display on UI
displayOnUI.description: If true, this condition is listed in the conditions panel at the top of the screen.

pennedAnimalsSeekShelter.label: Penned animals seek shelter
pennedAnimalsSeekShelter.description: If true, animals in pens will attempt to move to roofed areas while this condition is active.

spreadsFilth.label: Spreads filth
spreadsFilth.description: ThingDef (typically a filth type) scattered onto the map while this condition is active.

canAffectAllPlanetLayers.label: Can affect all planet layers
canAffectAllPlanetLayers.description: If true, this condition is eligible on every planet layer regardless of layerWhitelist and layerBlacklist.

layerWhitelist.label: Layer whitelist
layerWhitelist.description: If non-empty, this condition only applies on these PlanetLayerDefs (Odyssey expansion).

layerBlacklist.label: Layer blacklist
layerBlacklist.description: This condition cannot apply on any PlanetLayerDef in this list (Odyssey expansion).

defaultDroneLevel.label: Default drone level
defaultDroneLevel.description: PsychicDroneLevel applied to all pawns on the map while this condition is active.

preventRain.label: Prevent rain
preventRain.description: If true, rain is suppressed on the map while this condition is active.

weatherDef.label: Weather def
weatherDef.description: WeatherDef forced onto the map while this condition is active (used by force-weather conditions).

temperatureOffset.label: Temperature offset
temperatureOffset.description: Flat temperature change (in Celsius) applied to the map while this condition is active.

minNearbyPollution.label: Min nearby pollution
minNearbyPollution.description: Minimum nearby pollution level required for this condition to start. Used by pollution-triggered conditions.

mtbOverNearbyPollutionCurve.label: MTB over nearby pollution curve
mtbOverNearbyPollutionCurve.description: Curve mapping nearby pollution level to mean time between firings (in days). X = pollution, Y = MTB days.

fishPopulationOffsetPerDay.label: Fish population offset per day
fishPopulationOffsetPerDay.description: Amount added to or subtracted from the map's fish population each day while this condition is active.

basic-game-condition.label: Basic game condition
basic-game-condition.description: A simple timed map condition with a start letter and UI display.

force-weather-condition.label: Force weather condition
force-weather-condition.description: A condition that overrides map weather for its duration.
